title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
